text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. My next race is in Kyoto, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Just thought I'd better do some
pre-race research.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I found all sorts of hidden fishing spots! Whenever
the fishing itch hits, just leave it to me. ♪
